# Skowron-Gould Complex Root Solver

This directory vendors the official C++ rewrite of:

```text
J. Skowron & A. Gould (2012),
"General Complex Polynomial Root Solver and Its Further Optimization for Binary Microlenses"
```

Source:

```text
https://www.astrouw.edu.pl/~jskowron/cmplx_roots_sg/
```

The files are kept separate from the `lcbinint` C++ core so the solver origin,
license, and future local modifications stay clear.

License choice for this repository: Apache License, Version 2.0.

The upstream distribution is dual-licensed under Apache-2.0 or LGPL. See
`LICENSE` and `NOTICE` in this directory.
